completion:
<think>
The schema should include a table named "users", with columns for "id", "name", and "email". 
I'll also need to define a unique constraint on the "email" column. 
Finally, we should add a table named "orders" with columns for "id", "user_id", "order_date", "amount", and "status". 
</think>
```json
{
  "operations": [
    {
      "order": 1,
      "type": "create_table",
      "table": "users",
      "definition": {
        "columns": [
          {
            "name": "id",
            "data_type": "INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT",
            "null": false
          },
          {
            "name": "name",
            "data_type": "VARCHAR(255)",
            "null": false
          },
          {
            "name": "email",
            "data_type": "VARCHAR(255)",
            "unique": true,
            "null": false
          }
        ]
      }
    },
    {
      "order": 2,
      "type": "add_constraint",
      "table": "users",
      "definition": {
        "constraint_type": "UNIQUE",
        "on": "email",

        "name": "unique_email"
      }
    },
    {
      "order": 3,
      "type": "create_table",
      "table": "orders",
      "definition": {
        "columns": [
          {
            "name": "id",
            "data_type": "INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT",
            "null": false
          },
          {
            "name": "user_id",
            "data_type": "INTEGER",
            "null": false
          },
          {
            "name": "order_date",
            "data_type": "DATE",
            "null": false
          },
          {
            "name": "amount",
            "data_type": "DECIMAL(10, 2)",
            "null": false
          },
          {
            "name": "status",
            "data_type": "ENUM('pending', 'processing', 'completed')",
            "null": false
          }
        ]
      }
    },
    {
      "order": 4,
      "type": "add_column",
      "table": "orders",
      "definition": {
        "column_name": "customer_id",
        "data_type": "INTEGER",
        "null": false
      }
    },
    {
      "order": 5,
      "type": "add_constraint",
      "table": "orders",
      "definition": {
        "constraint_type": "FOREIGN KEY",
        "on": "user_id",
        "columns": ["user_id"],
        "references": "id",
        "name": "user_id_constraint"
      }
    }
  ]
}
```
